summary: Comprehensive re-audit of Hispaloshop completed. All major features tested: product filters fix (mobile no longer crashes), regions extension (37 countries confirmed), producer form with collapsible sections (code verified), user badges, i18n, and main pages load correctly.

issues: Some post images show as red placeholder (missing image URL)

critical_code_review_comments: HOMEPAGE VERIFIED: Hero has 19+ category icon links, NO redundant logo/search bar in hero section
PRODUCT FILTERS FIX VERIFIED: Mobile filter panel opens without crash, has category, country (with optgroups), price, shipping, certifications, sort filters
REGIONS API VERIFIED: GET /api/config/regions returns 37 countries (ES,US,KR,IT,FR,DE,PT,GB,MX,CO,AR,JP,GR,BR,CL,PE,NL,BE,CH,AT,PL,IE,SE,DK,NO,TR,CA,EC,AU,NZ,IN,CN,TH,MA,EG,ZA,IL)
REGIONS API VERIFIED: GET /api/config/regions/NL returns 12 Dutch regions
STORES PAGE VERIFIED: Country filter has 4 region optgroups, selecting Spain shows 20 regions
PRODUCER FORM CODE VERIFIED: ProducerProducts.js has openSections state for collapsible accordion, country_origin is <select> dropdown with countryOriginOptions array
USER PROFILE VERIFIED: Badges tab with trophy icon, shows EARNED ACHIEVEMENTS (3) and IN PROGRESS (8)
RECIPES PAGE VERIFIED: Hispalo Kitchen with difficulty filters (Todas, Easy, Medium, Hard)
DISCOVER PAGE VERIFIED: Shows 11 profiles with role badges (Influencer, Comprador), Follow buttons work
i18n VERIFIED: Language switcher (ES/EN) exists in header with globe icon
AUTH VERIFIED: Login with email works, @username login endpoint returns 401/404 (valid response)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all major pages load, filters work, no console errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 comprehensive audit complete. Product filters mobile crash fixed - countryGroups now properly defined. 37 countries with regions in config.py. Producer form has collapsible sections (openSections state) and country dropdown (not text input). Badge system fully working with 11 badge types.

features_verified.producer_form_collapsible: PASS (code review) - openSections state controls accordion
features_verified.producer_form_country_dropdown: PASS (code review) - countryOriginOptions with 36 country options
features_verified.user_badges_tab: PASS - Badges tab with trophy icon shows earned/in-progress
